text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->suspended

Mail from the Orginator: 

|I agree with the proposed solution. However, right now my job is not  
|Postgresql-connected, that's why I lost my interest in fixing it. I'll  
|see if I'll be able to come up with a separate port in my spare time. 
|Please set the state to suspended.
